source_pr.title: fix: close issue #62088 do not generate trash files when ut fails
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

if make ut fails it only run FAILPOINT_DISABLE but not run CLEAN_UT_BINARY
then exit 1

this patch fix it, and also fix some other issues like this

cc @lance6716 

<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #62088

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No need to test
  > - [x] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

test.name: fix: close issue #62088 do not generate trash files when ut fails

root_cause_explanation: Insufficient evidence to determine the underlying root cause from the available case data; needs CI logs or a reliable repro.
fix_pattern: Ensure UT cleanup runs even on failures (run CLEAN_UT_BINARY and disable failpoints) to avoid leaving trash binaries/files on CI.
analysis:
PR title: fix: close issue #62088 do not generate trash files when ut fails
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/62514
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: - tools/bin/ut --junitfile "$(TEST_COVERAGE_DIR)/tidb-junit-report.xml" --coverprofile "$(TEST_COVERAGE_DIR)/tidb_cov.unit_test.out" --except unstable.txt || { $(FAILPOINT_DISABLE); exit 1; }
Changed files (1): Makefile
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
